tasks.start: npm run build:client && DENO_NO_PACKAGE_JSON=1 deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-run --allow-env=BROWSER src/main.ts
tasks.test: npm run build:client && DENO_NO_PACKAGE_JSON=1 deno test --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net=127.0.0.1 test src/cli src/log_test.ts src/server
tasks.compile: npm run build:client && DENO_NO_PACKAGE_JSON=1 deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run=deno scripts/compile.ts
tasks.dist: npm run build:client && DENO_NO_PACKAGE_JSON=1 deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run --allow-net=127.0.0.1:39731 scripts/build_release.ts
tasks.install:mac: npm run build:client && DENO_NO_PACKAGE_JSON=1 deno run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-run=deno --allow-env=HOME scripts/install_macos.ts
